name: Horde Breaker
description: Once on each of your turns when you make a weapon attack, you can make another attack with the same weapon against a different creature that is within 5 feet of the original target and within range of your weapon.

mechanics.trigger: when you make a weapon attack
mechanics.condition: target is a different creature within 5 feet of the original target and within the weapon's range
mechanics.weapon: same weapon as the original attack
